    10→
    11→enum AppTab: Hashable, CaseIterable {
    12→    case home
    13→    case workout
    14→    case fitorb
    15→    case activity
    16→    case profile
    17→
    18→    var title: String {
    19→        switch self {
    20→        case .home: return "tab.home".localized
    21→        case .workout: return "tab.workout".localized
    22→        case .fitorb: return "tab.fitorb".localized
    23→        case .activity: return "tab.activity".localized
    24→        case .profile: return "tab.profile".localized
    25→        }
    26→    }
    27→
    28→    var systemImage: String {
    29→        switch self {
    30→        case .home: return "house.fill"
    31→        case .workout: return "dumbbell.fill"
    32→        case .fitorb: return "sparkles"
    33→        case .activity: return "chart.bar.fill"
    34→        case .profile: return "person.fill"
    35→        }
    36→    }
    37→}
    38→
    39→enum AppRoute: Hashable {
    40→    case onboarding
    41→    case editProfile  // Rota separada para edição de perfil existente
    42→    case setup
    43→    case workoutPlan(UUID)
    44→    case exerciseDetail
    45→    case workoutExecution  // Nova view de execução com timer e pause/play
    46→    case workoutExercisePreview(ExercisePrescription)  // Preview de exercício (não altera índice)
    47→    case workoutPreview(ProgramWorkout)  // Preview de treino antes de iniciar (Task 7.0)
    48→    case workoutSummary
    49→    case paywall
    50→    case programDetail(String)  // Detalhe do programa
    51→    case programWorkoutDetail(ProgramWorkout)  // Detalhe de um treino dentro do programa (Wger exercises)
    52→    case libraryWorkoutDetail(String)  // Detalhe de um treino da biblioteca (por ID)
    53→    case programExerciseDetail(ExercisePrescription)  // Detalhe de exercício na biblioteca/programa
    54→    case apiKeySettings  // Configuração de chave de API do usuário
    55→    case healthKitSettings // Integração Apple Health (PRO)
    56→    case privacySettings  // Privacy settings for social features
    57→    case authentication(inviteContext: String?)  // Authentication flow
    58→    case groupInvite(groupId: String)  // Group invitation deep link
    59→    case notifications  // Notifications screen for challenges
    60→    case customWorkouts  // Custom workout templates list
    61→    case customWorkoutBuilder(UUID?)  // Create or edit custom workout (nil = new)
    62→    case personalTrainer  // Personal Trainer connection and workouts
    63→    case trainerSearch  // Search for personal trainers
    64→    case cmsWorkoutDetail(String)  // CMS workout detail by ID
    65→    case cmsWorkoutFeedback(String)  // CMS workout feedback by ID
    66→    case aiChat  // AI Fitness Assistant (FitOrb)
    67→}
    68→
    69→struct DeepLink {
    70→    enum Destination {
    71→        case home
    72→        case onboarding
    73→        case setup
    74→        case paywall
    75→        case groupInvite(groupId: String)
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    let destination: Destination
    79→
    80→    init?(url: URL) {
    81→        guard let scheme = url.scheme?.lowercased(), scheme == "fittoday" else {
    82→            return nil
    83→        }
    84→
    85→        let host = url.host?.lowercased() ?? ""
    86→        let path = url.path.lowercased()
    87→
    88→        // Handle group invite: fittoday://group/invite/{groupId}
    89→        if host == "group", path.hasPrefix("/invite/") {
    90→            let groupId = String(path.dropFirst("/invite/".count))
    91→            destination = .groupInvite(groupId: groupId)
    92→            return
    93→        }
    94→
    95→        // Handle other routes
    96→        let pathOrHost = !host.isEmpty ? host : path
    97→        switch pathOrHost {
    98→        case "home", "/home":
    99→            destination = .home
   100→        case "onboarding", "/onboarding":
   101→            destination = .onboarding
   102→        case "setup", "/setup":
   103→            destination = .setup
   104→        case "paywall", "/paywall":
   105→            destination = .paywall
   106→        default:
   107→            return nil
   108→        }
   109→    }
   110→}
   111→
   112→@MainActor
   113→protocol AppRouting: AnyObject {
   114→    var selectedTab: AppTab { get set }
   115→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] { get set }
   116→
   117→    func select(tab: AppTab)
   118→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab?)
   119→    func pop(on tab: AppTab?)
   120→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink)
   121→}
   122→
   123→// 💡 Learn: Navegação com @Observable permite melhor performance
   124→@MainActor
   125→@Observable final class AppRouter: AppRouting {
   126→    var selectedTab: AppTab = .home
   127→    var tabPaths: [AppTab: NavigationPath] = [:]
   128→
   129→    init() {
   130→        AppTab.allCases.forEach { tab in
   131→            tabPaths[tab] = NavigationPath()
   132→        }
   133→    }
   134→
   135→    func select(tab: AppTab) {
   136→        selectedTab = tab
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    func push(_ route: AppRoute, on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   140→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   141→        if tabPaths[target] == nil {
   142→            tabPaths[target] = NavigationPath()
   143→        }
   144→        tabPaths[target]?.append(route)
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    func pop(on tab: AppTab? = nil) {
   148→        let target = tab ?? selectedTab
   149→        guard var path = tabPaths[target], !path.isEmpty else {
   150→            return
   151→        }
   152→        path.removeLast()
   153→        tabPaths[target] = path
   154→    }
   155→
   156→    func handle(deeplink: DeepLink) {
   157→        switch deeplink.destination {
   158→        case .home:
   159→            select(tab: .home)
   160→        case .onboarding:
   161→            select(tab: .home)
   162→            push(.onboarding, on: .home)
   163→        case .setup:
   164→            select(tab: .home)
   165→            push(.setup, on: .home)
   166→        case .paywall:
   167→            select(tab: .home)
   168→            push(.paywall, on: .home)
   169→        case .groupInvite(let groupId):
   170→            select(tab: .home)
   171→            push(.groupInvite(groupId: groupId), on: .home)
   172→        }
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    func handle(url: URL) {
   176→        guard let link = DeepLink(url: url) else { return }
   177→        handle(deeplink: link)
   178→    }
   179→}
   180→
   181→

    34→    private let discoverTrainersUseCase: DiscoverTrainersUseCaseProtocol?
    35→    private let requestConnectionUseCase: RequestTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol?
    36→    private let cancelConnectionUseCase: CancelTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol?
    37→    private let getCurrentTrainerUseCase: GetCurrentTrainerUseCaseProtocol?
    38→    private let fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase: FetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCaseProtocol?
    39→    private let fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase: FetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase?
    40→    private let featureFlagChecker: FeatureFlagChecking?
    41→    private let cmsWorkoutRepository: CMSWorkoutRepository?
    42→    private let authRepository: AuthenticationRepository?
    43→
    44→    private var observationTask: Task<Void, Never>?
    45→    private var workoutsObservationTask: Task<Void, Never>?
    46→
    47→    // MARK: - Initialization
    48→
    49→    init(resolver: Resolver) {
    50→        self.discoverTrainersUseCase = resolver.resolve(DiscoverTrainersUseCaseProtocol.self)
    51→        self.requestConnectionUseCase = resolver.resolve(RequestTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol.self)
    52→        self.cancelConnectionUseCase = resolver.resolve(CancelTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol.self)
    53→        self.getCurrentTrainerUseCase = resolver.resolve(GetCurrentTrainerUseCaseProtocol.self)
    54→        self.fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase = resolver.resolve(FetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCaseProtocol.self)
    55→        self.fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase = resolver.resolve(FetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase.self)
    56→        self.featureFlagChecker = resolver.resolve(FeatureFlagChecking.self)
    57→        self.cmsWorkoutRepository = resolver.resolve(CMSWorkoutRepository.self)
    58→        self.authRepository = resolver.resolve(AuthenticationRepository.self)
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    // For testing
    62→    init(
    63→        discoverTrainersUseCase: DiscoverTrainersUseCaseProtocol? = nil,
    64→        requestConnectionUseCase: RequestTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol? = nil,
    65→        cancelConnectionUseCase: CancelTrainerConnectionUseCaseProtocol? = nil,
    66→        getCurrentTrainerUseCase: GetCurrentTrainerUseCaseProtocol? = nil,
    67→        fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase: FetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCaseProtocol? = nil,
    68→        fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase: FetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase? = nil,
    69→        featureFlagChecker: FeatureFlagChecking? = nil,
    70→        cmsWorkoutRepository: CMSWorkoutRepository? = nil,
    71→        authRepository: AuthenticationRepository? = nil
    72→    ) {
    73→        self.discoverTrainersUseCase = discoverTrainersUseCase
    74→        self.requestConnectionUseCase = requestConnectionUseCase
    75→        self.cancelConnectionUseCase = cancelConnectionUseCase
    76→        self.getCurrentTrainerUseCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase
    77→        self.fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase
    78→        self.fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase = fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase
    79→        self.featureFlagChecker = featureFlagChecker
    80→        self.cmsWorkoutRepository = cmsWorkoutRepository
    81→        self.authRepository = authRepository
    82→    }
    83→
    84→    // Note: Task cancellation is handled by onDisappear()
    85→    // deinit removed to avoid @MainActor isolation issues
    86→
    87→    // MARK: - Computed Properties
    88→
    89→    var isConnected: Bool {
    90→        connectionStatus == .active
    91→    }
    92→
    93→    var isPending: Bool {
    94→        connectionStatus == .pending
    95→    }
    96→
    97→    var hasTrainer: Bool {
    98→        currentTrainer != nil
    99→    }
   100→
   101→    var canSearch: Bool {
   102→        !searchQuery.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    var canUseInviteCode: Bool {
   106→        !inviteCode.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty
   107→    }
   108→
   109→    var pendingWorkoutsCount: Int {
   110→        assignedWorkouts.filter { $0.isActive }.count
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    // MARK: - Lifecycle
   114→
   115→    func onAppear() {
   116→        Task {
   117→            await checkFeatureFlag()
   118→            if isFeatureEnabled {
   119→                await loadCurrentTrainer()
   120→                startObservingRelationship()
   121→                startObservingWorkouts()
   122→            }
   123→        }
   124→    }
   125→
   126→    func onDisappear() {
   127→        observationTask?.cancel()
   128→        workoutsObservationTask?.cancel()
   129→    }
   130→
   131→    // MARK: - Feature Flag
   132→
   133→    private func checkFeatureFlag() async {
   134→        guard let checker = featureFlagChecker else {
   135→            isFeatureEnabled = false
   136→            return
   137→        }
   138→        isFeatureEnabled = await checker.isFeatureEnabled(.personalTrainerEnabled)
   139→        isChatEnabled = await checker.isFeatureEnabled(.trainerChatEnabled)
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    // MARK: - Load Current Trainer
   143→
   144→    func loadCurrentTrainer() async {
   145→        guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else {
   146→            #if DEBUG
   147→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] GetCurrentTrainerUseCase not available")
   148→            #endif
   149→            return
   150→        }
   151→
   152→        isLoading = true
   153→        error = nil
   154→
   155→        do {
   156→            if let result = try await useCase.execute() {
   157→                currentTrainer = result.trainer
   158→                connectionStatus = result.relationship.status
   159→                relationshipId = result.relationship.id
   160→                await loadAssignedWorkouts()
   161→            } else {
   162→                currentTrainer = nil
   163→                connectionStatus = nil
   164→                relationshipId = nil
   165→                assignedWorkouts = []
   166→            }
   167→        } catch {
   168→            self.error = error
   169→            #if DEBUG
   170→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading trainer: \(error)")
   171→            #endif
   172→        }
   173→
   174→        isLoading = false
   175→    }
   176→
   177→    // MARK: - Search Trainers
   178→
   179→    func searchTrainers() async {
   180→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   181→            #if DEBUG
   182→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   183→            #endif
   184→            return
   185→        }
   186→
   187→        let query = searchQuery.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   188→
   189→        isSearching = true
   190→        error = nil
   191→
   192→        do {
   193→            if query.isEmpty {
   194→                // Load all active trainers from CMS marketplace
   195→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName("", limit: 20)
   196→            } else {
   197→                searchResults = try await useCase.searchByName(query, limit: 20)
   198→            }
   199→        } catch {
   200→            self.error = error
   201→            searchResults = []
   202→            #if DEBUG
   203→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error searching trainers: \(error)")
   204→            #endif
   205→        }
   206→
   207→        isSearching = false
   208→    }
   209→
   210→    // MARK: - Find by Invite Code
   211→
   212→    func findByInviteCode() async {
   213→        guard let useCase = discoverTrainersUseCase else {
   214→            #if DEBUG
   215→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] DiscoverTrainersUseCase not available")
   216→            #endif
   217→            return
   218→        }
   219→
   220→        let code = inviteCode.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
   221→        guard !code.isEmpty else {
   222→            return
   223→        }
   224→
   225→        isSearching = true
   226→        error = nil
   227→
   228→        do {
   229→            if let trainer = try await useCase.findByInviteCode(code) {
   230→                selectedTrainer = trainer
   231→                showConnectionSheet = true
   232→            } else {
   233→                error = PersonalTrainerError.invalidInviteCode
   234→            }
   235→        } catch {
   236→            self.error = error
   237→            #if DEBUG
   238→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error finding by invite code: \(error)")
   239→            #endif
   240→        }
   241→
   242→        isSearching = false
   243→    }
   244→
   245→    // MARK: - Request Connection
   246→
   247→    func requestConnection(to trainer: PersonalTrainer) async -> Bool {
   248→        guard let useCase = requestConnectionUseCase else {
   249→            #if DEBUG
   250→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] RequestTrainerConnectionUseCase not available")
   251→            #endif
   252→            return false
   253→        }
   254→
   255→        isRequestingConnection = true
   256→        error = nil
   257→
   258→        do {
   259→            let newRelationshipId = try await useCase.execute(trainerId: trainer.id)
   260→            relationshipId = newRelationshipId
   261→            currentTrainer = trainer
   262→            connectionStatus = .pending
   263→            showConnectionSheet = false
   264→            selectedTrainer = nil
   265→            searchResults = []
   266→            searchQuery = ""
   267→            inviteCode = ""
   268→
   269→            // Register student in CMS so the trainer can assign workouts
   270→            await registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: trainer.id)
   271→
   272→            return true
   273→        } catch {
   274→            self.error = error
   275→            #if DEBUG
   276→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error requesting connection: \(error)")
   277→            #endif
   278→            return false
   279→        }
   280→    }
   281→
   282→    // MARK: - CMS Student Registration
   283→
   284→    /// Registers the student in the CMS after a successful Firebase connection.
   285→    /// This is best-effort — failure does not block the connection flow.
   286→    private func registerStudentInCMS(trainerId: String) async {
   287→        guard let repo = cmsWorkoutRepository,
   288→              let authRepo = authRepository else {
   289→            #if DEBUG
   290→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: dependencies not available")
   291→            #endif
   292→            return
   293→        }
   294→
   295→        do {
   296→            guard let user = try await authRepo.currentUser() else {
   297→                #if DEBUG
   298→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration skipped: no current user")
   299→                #endif
   300→                return
   301→            }
   302→
   303→            try await repo.registerStudent(
   304→                firebaseUid: user.id,
   305→                trainerId: trainerId,
   306→                displayName: user.displayName,
   307→                email: user.email
   308→            )
   309→
   310→            #if DEBUG
   311→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Student registered in CMS for trainer \(trainerId)")
   312→            #endif
   313→        } catch {
   314→            #if DEBUG
   315→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS registration failed (non-blocking): \(error)")
   316→            #endif
   317→        }
   318→    }
   319→
   320→    // MARK: - Cancel Connection
   321→
   322→    func cancelConnection() async -> Bool {
   323→        guard let useCase = cancelConnectionUseCase,
   324→              let relId = relationshipId else {
   325→            #if DEBUG
   326→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CancelTrainerConnectionUseCase not available or no relationship")
   327→            #endif
   328→            return false
   329→        }
   330→
   331→        isLoading = true
   332→        error = nil
   333→
   334→        do {
   335→            try await useCase.execute(relationshipId: relId)
   336→            currentTrainer = nil
   337→            connectionStatus = nil
   338→            relationshipId = nil
   339→            assignedWorkouts = []
   340→            return true
   341→        } catch {
   342→            self.error = error
   343→            #if DEBUG
   344→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error canceling connection: \(error)")
   345→            #endif
   346→            return false
   347→        }
   348→    }
   349→
   350→    // MARK: - Load Assigned Workouts
   351→
   352→    private func loadAssignedWorkouts() async {
   353→        // Try CMS workouts first (primary source)
   354→        if let cmsUseCase = fetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase {
   355→            do {
   356→                let result = try await cmsUseCase.execute()
   357→                assignedWorkouts = result.workouts
   358→                #if DEBUG
   359→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Loaded \(result.workouts.count) CMS workouts")
   360→                #endif
   361→                return
   362→            } catch {
   363→                #if DEBUG
   364→                print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] CMS workouts failed, falling back to Firebase: \(error)")
   365→                #endif
   366→            }
   367→        }
   368→
   369→        // Fallback to Firebase workouts
   370→        guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else {
   371→            return
   372→        }
   373→
   374→        do {
   375→            assignedWorkouts = try await useCase.execute()
   376→        } catch {
   377→            #if DEBUG
   378→            print("[PersonalTrainerViewModel] Error loading workouts: \(error)")
   379→            #endif
   380→        }
   381→    }
   382→
   383→    // MARK: - Observation
   384→
   385→    private func startObservingRelationship() {
   386→        observationTask?.cancel()
   387→        observationTask = Task {
   388→            guard let useCase = getCurrentTrainerUseCase else { return }
   389→
   390→            for await relationship in useCase.observeRelationship() {
   391→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   392→
   393→                if let rel = relationship {
   394→                    connectionStatus = rel.status
   395→                    relationshipId = rel.id
   396→
   397→                    // Reload trainer if status changed
   398→                    if rel.status == .active && currentTrainer == nil {
   399→                        await loadCurrentTrainer()
   400→                    }
   401→                } else {
   402→                    currentTrainer = nil
   403→                    connectionStatus = nil
   404→                    relationshipId = nil
   405→                }
   406→            }
   407→        }
   408→    }
   409→
   410→    private func startObservingWorkouts() {
   411→        workoutsObservationTask?.cancel()
   412→        workoutsObservationTask = Task {
   413→            guard let useCase = fetchAssignedWorkoutsUseCase else { return }
   414→
   415→            for await workouts in useCase.observe() {
   416→                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
   417→                assignedWorkouts = workouts
   418→            }
   419→        }
   420→    }
   421→
   422→    // MARK: - UI Helpers
   423→
   424→    func selectTrainer(_ trainer: PersonalTrainer) {
   425→        selectedTrainer = trainer
   426→        showConnectionSheet = true
   427→    }
   428→
   429→    func dismissConnectionSheet() {
   430→        showConnectionSheet = false
   431→        selectedTrainer = nil
   432→    }
   433→
   434→    func clearError() {
   435→        error = nil
   436→    }
   437→
   438→    func clearSearch() {
   439→        searchQuery = ""
   440→        Task { await searchTrainers() }
   441→    }
   442→}
   443→

1→//
     2→//  FeatureFlag.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Feature flags for remote configuration of features.
     6→//  Used to control feature rollout and A/B testing.
     7→//
     8→
     9→import Foundation
    10→
    11→// MARK: - Feature Flag Key
    12→
    13→/// Keys for remote feature flags controlled via Firebase Remote Config.
    14→/// Each key corresponds to a boolean flag that can be toggled remotely.
    15→enum FeatureFlagKey: String, CaseIterable, Sendable {
    16→
    17→    // MARK: - AI Features
    18→
    19→    /// Enables AI-powered workout generation (OpenAI).
    20→    case aiWorkoutGenerationEnabled = "ai_workout_generation_enabled"
    21→
    22→    /// Enables AI exercise substitution during active workout.
    23→    case aiExerciseSubstitutionEnabled = "ai_exercise_substitution_enabled"
    24→
    25→    // MARK: - Social Features
    26→
    27→    /// Enables group creation, joining, and management.
    28→    case socialGroupsEnabled = "social_groups_enabled"
    29→
    30→    /// Enables workout challenges within groups.
    31→    case challengesEnabled = "challenges_enabled"
    32→
    33→    /// Enables leaderboard ranking in groups.
    34→    case leaderboardEnabled = "leaderboard_enabled"
    35→
    36→    /// Enables photo check-in for challenge validation.
    37→    case checkInEnabled = "check_in_enabled"
    38→
    39→    /// Enables group streak tracking and display.
    40→    case groupStreaksEnabled = "group_streaks_enabled"
    41→
    42→    // MARK: - Health & Sync
    43→
    44→    /// Enables Apple Health read/write integration.
    45→    case healthKitSyncEnabled = "healthkit_sync_enabled"
    46→
    47→    /// Enables activity stats with Swift Charts.
    48→    case statsChartsEnabled = "stats_charts_enabled"
    49→
    50→    // MARK: - Content
    51→
    52→    /// Enables structured training programs.
    53→    case programsEnabled = "programs_enabled"
    54→
    55→    /// Enables user-created workout templates.
    56→    case customWorkoutsEnabled = "custom_workouts_enabled"
    57→
    58→    /// Enables exercise library/explorer (Wger API).
    59→    case exerciseLibraryEnabled = "exercise_library_enabled"
    60→
    61→    // MARK: - Personal Trainer
    62→
    63→    /// Enables personal trainer integration features.
    64→    /// When enabled, users can connect with personal trainers via CMS.
    65→    case personalTrainerEnabled = "personal_trainer_enabled"
    66→
    67→    /// Enables synchronization of workouts from CMS.
    68→    /// When enabled, trainer-assigned workouts sync to the user's app.
    69→    case cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled = "cms_workout_sync_enabled"
    70→
    71→    /// Enables chat functionality with personal trainers.
    72→    /// When enabled, users can message their assigned trainer.
    73→    case trainerChatEnabled = "trainer_chat_enabled"
    74→
    75→    // MARK: - Monetization & UX
    76→
    77→    /// Enables paywall/Pro upgrade prompts.
    78→    case paywallEnabled = "paywall_enabled"
    79→
    80→    /// Enables App Store review request after workout completion.
    81→    case reviewRequestEnabled = "review_request_enabled"
    82→
    83→    // MARK: - Operational
    84→
    85→    /// Shows maintenance banner and disables write operations.
    86→    case maintenanceModeEnabled = "maintenance_mode_enabled"
    87→
    88→    /// Shows non-dismissable update dialog directing to App Store.
    89→    case forceUpdateEnabled = "force_update_enabled"
    90→
    91→    // MARK: - Display Name
    92→
    93→    /// Human-readable display name for the feature flag.
    94→    var displayName: String {
    95→        switch self {
    96→        // AI
    97→        case .aiWorkoutGenerationEnabled: return "AI Workout Generation"
    98→        case .aiExerciseSubstitutionEnabled: return "AI Exercise Substitution"
    99→        // Social
   100→        case .socialGroupsEnabled: return "Social Groups"
   101→        case .challengesEnabled: return "Challenges"
   102→        case .leaderboardEnabled: return "Leaderboard"
   103→        case .checkInEnabled: return "Check-In"
   104→        case .groupStreaksEnabled: return "Group Streaks"
   105→        // Health
   106→        case .healthKitSyncEnabled: return "Apple Health Sync"
   107→        case .statsChartsEnabled: return "Stats Charts"
   108→        // Content
   109→        case .programsEnabled: return "Training Programs"
   110→        case .customWorkoutsEnabled: return "Custom Workouts"
   111→        case .exerciseLibraryEnabled: return "Exercise Library"
   112→        // Personal Trainer
   113→        case .personalTrainerEnabled: return "Personal Trainer Integration"
   114→        case .cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled: return "CMS Workout Sync"
   115→        case .trainerChatEnabled: return "Trainer Chat"
   116→        // Monetization
   117→        case .paywallEnabled: return "Paywall"
   118→        case .reviewRequestEnabled: return "Review Request"
   119→        // Operational
   120→        case .maintenanceModeEnabled: return "Maintenance Mode"
   121→        case .forceUpdateEnabled: return "Force Update"
   122→        }
   123→    }
   124→
   125→    // MARK: - Default Value
   126→
   127→    /// Default value when remote config is unavailable.
   128→    /// Existing features default to `true` (no regression).
   129→    /// Unreleased features default to `false`.
   130→    var defaultValue: Bool {
   131→        switch self {
   132→        // Unreleased features — disabled by default
   133→        case .personalTrainerEnabled,
   134→             .cmsWorkoutSyncEnabled,
   135→             .trainerChatEnabled,
   136→             .maintenanceModeEnabled,
   137→             .forceUpdateEnabled:
   138→            return false
   139→
   140→        // All existing features — enabled by default
   141→        default:
   142→            return true
   143→        }
   144→    }
   145→}
   146→

1→//
     2→//  PersonalTrainerModels.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Created by Claude on 04/02/26.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→// MARK: - Personal Trainer
    11→
    12→/// Represents a personal trainer in the CMS integration system.
    13→///
    14→/// Personal trainers can create workout plans through the CMS portal and
    15→/// connect with students (app users) to deliver personalized training programs.
    16→struct PersonalTrainer: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
    17→    /// Unique identifier for the trainer (Firebase UID).
    18→    let id: String
    19→
    20→    /// Display name shown to students.
    21→    var displayName: String
    22→
    23→    /// Trainer's email address.
    24→    var email: String
    25→
    26→    /// URL to the trainer's profile photo.
    27→    var photoURL: URL?
    28→
    29→    /// Areas of expertise (e.g., "strength", "weight_loss", "flexibility").
    30→    var specializations: [String]
    31→
    32→    /// Short biography or description.
    33→    var bio: String?
    34→
    35→    /// Whether the trainer is currently accepting new students.
    36→    var isActive: Bool
    37→
    38→    /// Unique invite code students can use to connect.
    39→    var inviteCode: String?
    40→
    41→    /// Maximum number of students this trainer can manage.
    42→    var maxStudents: Int
    43→
    44→    /// Current number of connected students.
    45→    var currentStudentCount: Int
    46→
    47→    /// Whether the trainer can accept more students.
    48→    var canAcceptStudents: Bool {
    49→        isActive && currentStudentCount < maxStudents
    50→    }
    51→}
    52→
    53→// MARK: - Trainer Student Relationship
    54→
    55→/// Represents the connection between a personal trainer and a student.
    56→///
    57→/// This relationship tracks the lifecycle from initial request through
    58→/// active training to potential cancellation.
    59→struct TrainerStudentRelationship: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
    60→    /// Unique identifier for this relationship.
    61→    let id: String
    62→
    63→    /// The personal trainer's identifier.
    64→    let trainerId: String
    65→
    66→    /// The student's identifier (app user).
    67→    let studentId: String
    68→
    69→    /// Current status of the connection.
    70→    var status: TrainerConnectionStatus
    71→
    72→    /// Who initiated the connection request.
    73→    let requestedBy: RequestedBy
    74→
    75→    /// When the connection was requested.
    76→    let requestedAt: Date
    77→
    78→    /// When the connection was accepted (nil if still pending).
    79→    var acceptedAt: Date?
    80→
    81→    /// Current subscription status for this relationship.
    82→    var subscriptionStatus: TrainerSubscriptionStatus
    83→
    84→    /// When the subscription expires (nil for unlimited).
    85→    var subscriptionExpiresAt: Date?
    86→
    87→    /// Whether the relationship is currently active and valid.
    88→    var isValid: Bool {
    89→        status == .active && (subscriptionStatus == .active || subscriptionStatus == .trial)
    90→    }
    91→}
    92→
    93→// MARK: - Connection Status
    94→
    95→/// Status of the trainer-student connection.
    96→enum TrainerConnectionStatus: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
    97→    /// Connection request is pending approval.
    98→    case pending
    99→
   100→    /// Connection is active and trainer can assign workouts.
   101→    case active
   102→
   103→    /// Connection is temporarily paused.
   104→    case paused
   105→
   106→    /// Connection has been cancelled by either party.
   107→    case cancelled
   108→}
   109→
   110→// MARK: - Subscription Status
   111→
   112→/// Subscription status for the trainer-student relationship.
   113→enum TrainerSubscriptionStatus: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   114→    /// Student is in trial period.
   115→    case trial
   116→
   117→    /// Subscription is active and paid.
   118→    case active
   119→
   120→    /// Subscription has expired.
   121→    case expired
   122→}
   123→
   124→// MARK: - Request Initiator
   125→
   126→/// Who initiated the trainer-student connection request.
   127→enum RequestedBy: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   128→    /// Student requested connection with trainer.
   129→    case student
   130→
   131→    /// Trainer invited the student.
   132→    case trainer
   133→}
   134→
   135→// MARK: - Trainer Workout
   136→
   137→/// Represents a workout assigned by a personal trainer to a student.
   138→///
   139→/// This is a domain model that wraps trainer-created workout data with
   140→/// attribution and scheduling information. It can be converted to a
   141→/// `WorkoutPlan` for execution in the app.
   142→struct TrainerWorkout: Sendable, Identifiable, Hashable, Codable {
   143→    /// Unique identifier for this workout.
   144→    let id: String
   145→
   146→    /// The trainer who created this workout.
   147→    let trainerId: String
   148→
   149→    /// Workout title/name.
   150→    var title: String
   151→
   152→    /// Optional description of the workout.
   153→    var description: String?
   154→
   155→    /// Focus area of the workout.
   156→    var focus: DailyFocus
   157→
   158→    /// Estimated duration in minutes.
   159→    var estimatedDurationMinutes: Int
   160→
   161→    /// Workout intensity level.
   162→    var intensity: WorkoutIntensity
   163→
   164→    /// Workout phases containing exercises.
   165→    var phases: [TrainerWorkoutPhase]
   166→
   167→    /// Schedule configuration for the workout.
   168→    var schedule: TrainerWorkoutSchedule
   169→
   170→    /// Whether the workout is currently active.
   171→    var isActive: Bool
   172→
   173→    /// When the workout was created.
   174→    var createdAt: Date
   175→
   176→    /// Version number for tracking updates.
   177→    var version: Int
   178→
   179→    /// Optional PDF URL for the workout attachment.
   180→    var pdfUrl: String?
   181→}
   182→
   183→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Phase
   184→
   185→/// Represents a phase/section within a trainer workout.
   186→struct TrainerWorkoutPhase: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   187→    /// Phase name (e.g., "Warmup", "Main Set", "Cooldown").
   188→    var name: String
   189→
   190→    /// Items/exercises in this phase.
   191→    var items: [TrainerWorkoutItem]
   192→}
   193→
   194→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Item
   195→
   196→/// Represents an individual exercise within a trainer workout phase.
   197→struct TrainerWorkoutItem: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   198→    /// Optional exercise ID from external sources.
   199→    var exerciseId: Int?
   200→
   201→    /// Exercise name.
   202→    var exerciseName: String
   203→
   204→    /// Number of sets to perform.
   205→    var sets: Int
   206→
   207→    /// Rep range (e.g., lower: 8, upper: 12).
   208→    var reps: IntRange
   209→
   210→    /// Rest period between sets in seconds.
   211→    var restSeconds: Int
   212→
   213→    /// Optional notes or instructions.
   214→    var notes: String?
   215→}
   216→
   217→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Schedule
   218→
   219→/// Schedule configuration for trainer workouts.
   220→struct TrainerWorkoutSchedule: Sendable, Hashable, Codable {
   221→    /// Schedule type.
   222→    var type: TrainerWorkoutScheduleType
   223→
   224→    /// Specific date for "once" type schedules.
   225→    var scheduledDate: Date?
   226→
   227→    /// Day of week (0-6, Sunday-Saturday) for "weekly" type schedules.
   228→    var dayOfWeek: Int?
   229→}
   230→
   231→// MARK: - Trainer Workout Schedule Type
   232→
   233→/// Type of schedule for trainer workouts.
   234→enum TrainerWorkoutScheduleType: String, Sendable, CaseIterable, Codable {
   235→    /// One-time scheduled workout.
   236→    case once
   237→
   238→    /// Recurring workout.
   239→    case recurring
   240→
   241→    /// Weekly scheduled workout.
   242→    case weekly
   243→}

     2→//  FeatureFlagUseCase.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Use case for checking feature flags with entitlement integration.
     6→//  Combines remote feature flags with subscription-based access control.
     7→//
     8→
     9→import Foundation
    10→
    11→// MARK: - Feature Flag Checking Protocol
    12→
    13→/// Protocol for checking feature flag states with entitlement integration.
    14→protocol FeatureFlagChecking: Sendable {
    15→    /// Checks if a feature flag is enabled.
    16→    /// - Parameter key: The feature flag key to check.
    17→    /// - Returns: `true` if the feature is enabled, `false` otherwise.
    18→    func isFeatureEnabled(_ key: FeatureFlagKey) async -> Bool
    19→
    20→    /// Checks feature access combining feature flag and entitlement.
    21→    /// - Parameters:
    22→    ///   - feature: The Pro feature to check access for.
    23→    ///   - flag: The feature flag that must be enabled.
    24→    /// - Returns: The result of the access check.
    25→    func checkFeatureAccess(_ feature: ProFeature, flag: FeatureFlagKey) async -> FeatureAccessResult
    26→
    27→    /// Refreshes feature flags from remote config.
    28→    /// - Throws: Error if refresh fails.
    29→    func refreshFlags() async throws
    30→}
    31→
    32→// MARK: - Feature Flag Use Case
    33→
    34→/// Use case implementation for feature flag checking.
    35→/// Logic: Check flag first, then delegate to entitlement if enabled.
    36→final class FeatureFlagUseCase: FeatureFlagChecking, @unchecked Sendable {
    37→    // MARK: - Properties
    38→
    39→    private let featureFlagRepository: FeatureFlagRepository
    40→    private let featureGating: FeatureGating
    41→
    42→    // MARK: - Initialization
    43→
    44→    /// Creates a new feature flag use case.
    45→    /// - Parameters:
    46→    ///   - featureFlagRepository: Repository for feature flag access.
    47→    ///   - featureGating: Use case for entitlement-based feature gating.
    48→    init(
    49→        featureFlagRepository: FeatureFlagRepository,
    50→        featureGating: FeatureGating
    51→    ) {
    52→        self.featureFlagRepository = featureFlagRepository
    53→        self.featureGating = featureGating
    54→    }
    55→
    56→    // MARK: - FeatureFlagChecking
    57→
    58→    func isFeatureEnabled(_ key: FeatureFlagKey) async -> Bool {
    59→        await featureFlagRepository.isEnabled(key)
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    func checkFeatureAccess(
    63→        _ feature: ProFeature,
    64→        flag: FeatureFlagKey
    65→    ) async -> FeatureAccessResult {
    66→        // Step 1: Check if feature flag is enabled
    67→        let flagEnabled = await featureFlagRepository.isEnabled(flag)
    68→
    69→        guard flagEnabled else {
    70→            // Feature flag is disabled - feature is not available
    71→            return .featureDisabled(reason: "\(flag.displayName) is not available yet.")
    72→        }
    73→
    74→        // Step 2: Feature flag is enabled, check entitlement
    75→        return await featureGating.checkAccess(to: feature)
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    func refreshFlags() async throws {
    79→        try await featureFlagRepository.fetchAndActivate()
    80→    }
    81→}

   324→// MARK: - Color Extension for Hex
   325→
   326→extension Color {
   327→    init(hex: String) {
   328→        let hex = hex.trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.alphanumerics.inverted)
   329→        var int: UInt64 = 0
   330→        Scanner(string: hex).scanHexInt64(&int)
   331→        let a, r, g, b: UInt64
   332→        switch hex.count {
   333→        case 3: // RGB (12-bit)
   334→            (a, r, g, b) = (255, (int >> 8) * 17, (int >> 4 & 0xF) * 17, (int & 0xF) * 17)
   335→        case 6: // RGB (24-bit)
   336→            (a, r, g, b) = (255, int >> 16, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
   337→        case 8: // ARGB (32-bit)
   338→            (a, r, g, b) = (int >> 24, int >> 16 & 0xFF, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
   339→        default:
   340→            (a, r, g, b) = (255, 0, 0, 0)
   341→        }
   342→        self.init(
   343→            .sRGB,
   344→            red: Double(r) / 255,
   345→            green: Double(g) / 255,
   346→            blue: Double(b) / 255,
   347→            opacity: Double(a) / 255
   348→        )
   349→    }
   350→}

   352→// MARK: - Retro Pattern Views
   353→
   354→struct RetroGridPattern: View {
   355→    let lineColor: Color
   356→    let spacing: CGFloat
   357→
   358→    var body: some View {
   359→        GeometryReader { geometry in
   360→            Path { path in
   361→                // Vertical lines
   362→                let cols = Int(geometry.size.width / spacing)
   363→                for i in 0...cols {
   364→                    let x = CGFloat(i) * spacing
   365→                    path.move(to: CGPoint(x: x, y: 0))
   366→                    path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: x, y: geometry.size.height))
   367→                }
   368→
   369→                // Horizontal lines
   370→                let rows = Int(geometry.size.height / spacing)
   371→                for i in 0...rows {
   372→                    let y = CGFloat(i) * spacing
   373→                    path.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
   374→                    path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: y))
   375→                }
   376→            }
   377→            .stroke(lineColor, lineWidth: 1)
   378→        }
   379→        .allowsHitTesting(false)
   380→        .accessibilityHidden(true)
   381→    }
   382→}
   383→
   384→struct DiagonalStripesPattern: View {
   385→    let color: Color
   386→    let spacing: CGFloat
   387→    let opacity: Double
   388→
   389→    var body: some View {
   390→        GeometryReader { geometry in
   391→            Path { path in
   392→                let diagonal = sqrt(pow(geometry.size.width, 2) + pow(geometry.size.height, 2))
   393→                let stripes = Int(diagonal / spacing)
   394→
   395→                for i in 0...stripes {
   396→                    let offset = CGFloat(i) * spacing
   397→                    path.move(to: CGPoint(x: -geometry.size.height + offset, y: 0))
   398→                    path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: offset, y: geometry.size.height))
   399→                }
   400→            }
   401→            .stroke(color.opacity(opacity), lineWidth: 2)
   402→        }
   403→        .rotationEffect(.degrees(45))
   404→        .allowsHitTesting(false)
   405→        .accessibilityHidden(true)
   406→    }
   407→}
   408→
   409→struct TechCornerBordersOverlay: View {
   410→    let color: Color
   411→    let length: CGFloat
   412→    let thickness: CGFloat
   413→
   414→    var body: some View {
   415→        GeometryReader { geometry in
   416→            Path { path in
   417→                // Top-left
   418→                path.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: length))
   419→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: 0))
   420→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: length, y: 0))
   421→
   422→                // Top-right
   423→                path.move(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width - length, y: 0))
   424→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: 0))
   425→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: length))
   426→
   427→                // Bottom-left
   428→                path.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: geometry.size.height - length))
   429→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: geometry.size.height))
   430→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: length, y: geometry.size.height))
   431→
   432→                // Bottom-right
   433→                path.move(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width - length, y: geometry.size.height))
   434→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: geometry.size.height))
   435→                path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: geometry.size.height - length))
   436→            }
   437→            .stroke(color, lineWidth: thickness)
   438→        }
   439→        .allowsHitTesting(false)
   440→        .accessibilityHidden(true)
   441→    }
   442→}
   443→
   444→struct ScanlinePattern: View {
   445→    let lineSpacing: CGFloat
   446→    let opacity: Double
   447→
   448→    var body: some View {
   449→        GeometryReader { geometry in
   450→            Path { path in
   451→                let lines = Int(geometry.size.height / lineSpacing)
   452→                for i in 0...lines {
   453→                    let y = CGFloat(i) * lineSpacing
   454→                    path.move(to: CGPoint(x: 0, y: y))
   455→                    path.addLine(to: CGPoint(x: geometry.size.width, y: y))
   456→                }
   457→            }
   458→            .stroke(Color.white.opacity(opacity), lineWidth: 1)
   459→        }
   460→        .allowsHitTesting(false)
   461→        .accessibilityHidden(true)
   462→    }
   463→}

   177→// MARK: - Flow Layout
   178→
   179→/// A simple flow layout for tags that wraps to next line
   180→struct FlowLayout: Layout {
   181→    var spacing: CGFloat = 8
   182→
   183→    func sizeThatFits(proposal: ProposedViewSize, subviews: Subviews, cache: inout ()) -> CGSize {
   184→        let result = arrangeSubviews(proposal: proposal, subviews: subviews)
   185→        return result.size
   186→    }
   187→
   188→    func placeSubviews(in bounds: CGRect, proposal: ProposedViewSize, subviews: Subviews, cache: inout ()) {
   189→        let result = arrangeSubviews(proposal: proposal, subviews: subviews)
   190→
   191→        for (index, subview) in subviews.enumerated() {
   192→            subview.place(at: CGPoint(x: bounds.minX + result.positions[index].x, y: bounds.minY + result.positions[index].y), proposal: .unspecified)
   193→        }
   194→    }
   195→
   196→    private func arrangeSubviews(proposal: ProposedViewSize, subviews: Subviews) -> (size: CGSize, positions: [CGPoint]) {
   197→        let maxWidth = proposal.width ?? .infinity
   198→        var positions: [CGPoint] = []
   199→        var currentX: CGFloat = 0
   200→        var currentY: CGFloat = 0
   201→        var lineHeight: CGFloat = 0
   202→
   203→        for subview in subviews {
   204→            let size = subview.sizeThatFits(.unspecified)
   205→
   206→            if currentX + size.width > maxWidth && currentX > 0 {
   207→                currentX = 0
   208→                currentY += lineHeight + spacing
   209→                lineHeight = 0
   210→            }
   211→
   212→            positions.append(CGPoint(x: currentX, y: currentY))
   213→            currentX += size.width + spacing
   214→            lineHeight = max(lineHeight, size.height)
   215→        }
   216→
   217→        let totalHeight = currentY + lineHeight
   218→        let lastWidth = subviews.last?.sizeThatFits(.unspecified).width ?? 0
   219→        let totalWidth = min(maxWidth, positions.reduce(0) { max($0, $1.x) } + lastWidth)
   220→
   221→        return (CGSize(width: totalWidth, height: totalHeight), positions)
   222→    }
   223→}

     2→//  CMSWorkoutUseCases.swift

    10→// MARK: - Fetch CMS Workouts Use Case
    11→
    12→/// Use case for fetching trainer workouts from the CMS.
    13→struct FetchCMSWorkoutsUseCase: Sendable {
    14→
    15→    private let repository: CMSWorkoutRepository
    16→    private let authRepository: AuthenticationRepository
    17→
    18→    init(repository: CMSWorkoutRepository, authRepository: AuthenticationRepository) {
    19→        self.repository = repository
    20→        self.authRepository = authRepository
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    /// Fetches workouts for the current user.
    24→    ///
    25→    /// - Parameters:
    26→    ///   - trainerId: Optional trainer ID to filter by.
    27→    ///   - page: Page number (default: 1).
    28→    ///   - limit: Items per page (default: 20).
    29→    /// - Returns: A tuple with workouts and hasMore flag.
    30→    func execute(
    31→        trainerId: String? = nil,
    32→        page: Int = 1,
    33→        limit: Int = 20
    34→    ) async throws -> (workouts: [TrainerWorkout], hasMore: Bool) {
    35→        guard let user = try await authRepository.currentUser() else {
    36→            throw CMSWorkoutError.notAuthenticated
    37→        }
    38→
    39→        return try await repository.fetchWorkouts(
    40→            studentId: user.id,
    41→            trainerId: trainerId,
    42→            page: page,
    43→            limit: limit
    44→        )
    45→    }
    46→}

   104→        self.repository = repository
   105→    }
   106→

   108→    ///

   116→// MARK: - Post Workout Feedback Use Case
   117→
   118→/// Use case for posting feedback on a workout.
   119→struct PostWorkoutFeedbackUseCase: Sendable {
   120→
   121→    private let repository: CMSWorkoutRepository
   122→
   123→    init(repository: CMSWorkoutRepository) {
   124→        self.repository = repository
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    /// Posts feedback for a workout.
   128→    ///
   129→    /// - Parameters:
   130→    ///   - workoutId: The workout ID.
   131→    ///   - type: The feedback type.
   132→    ///   - message: The feedback message.
   133→    ///   - rating: Optional rating (1-5).
   134→    /// - Returns: The created feedback.
   135→    func execute(
   136→        workoutId: String,
   137→        type: CMSFeedbackType,
   138→        message: String,
   139→        rating: Int? = nil
   140→    ) async throws -> CMSWorkoutFeedback {
   141→        guard !message.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).isEmpty else {
   142→            throw CMSWorkoutError.invalidFeedback
   143→        }
   144→
   145→        if let rating, (rating < 1 || rating > 5) {
   146→            throw CMSWorkoutError.invalidRating
   147→        }
   148→
   149→        return try await repository.postFeedback(
   150→            workoutId: workoutId,
   151→            type: type,
   152→            message: message,
   153→            rating: rating
   154→        )
   155→    }
   156→}

   192→        try await repository.archiveWorkout(id: id)
   193→    }
   194→}
   195→
   196→// MARK: - CMS Workout Error
   197→
   198→/// Errors that can occur during CMS workout operations.
   199→enum CMSWorkoutError: LocalizedError, Sendable {
   200→    case notAuthenticated
   201→    case workoutNotFound
   202→    case invalidFeedback
   203→    case invalidRating
   204→    case syncFailed
   205→
   206→    var errorDescription: String? {
   207→        switch self {
   208→        case .notAuthenticated:
   209→            return "Voce precisa estar logado para acessar os treinos"
   210→        case .workoutNotFound:
   211→            return "Treino nao encontrado"
   212→        case .invalidFeedback:
   213→            return "A mensagem de feedback nao pode estar vazia"
   214→        case .invalidRating:
   215→            return "A avaliacao deve ser entre 1 e 5"
   216→        case .syncFailed:
   217→            return "Falha ao sincronizar com o CMS"
   218→        }
   219→    }
   220→}
   221→

1→//
     2→//  TrainerEvolutionView.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Evolution/progress view with metrics and weight progression chart.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Charts
     9→import SwiftUI
    10→
    11→struct TrainerEvolutionView: View {
    12→    let workouts: [TrainerWorkout]
    13→
    14→    private var totalWorkouts: Int {
    15→        workouts.count
    16→    }
    17→
    18→    private var loadChange: Double {
    19→        let sorted = workouts.sorted { $0.createdAt < $1.createdAt }
    20→        guard sorted.count >= 2 else { return 0 }
    21→        let recentCount = max(1, sorted.count / 2)
    22→        let olderSlice = sorted.prefix(sorted.count - recentCount)
    23→        let recentSlice = sorted.suffix(recentCount)
    24→        let olderAvg = averageExerciseCount(Array(olderSlice))
    25→        let recentAvg = averageExerciseCount(Array(recentSlice))
    26→        guard olderAvg > 0 else { return 0 }
    27→        return ((recentAvg - olderAvg) / olderAvg) * 100
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    private var frequencyPercent: Int {
    31→        let calendar = Calendar.current
    32→        guard let oldest = workouts.min(by: { $0.createdAt < $1.createdAt })?.createdAt else { return 0 }
    33→        let weeks = max(1, calendar.dateComponents([.weekOfYear], from: oldest, to: Date()).weekOfYear ?? 1)
    34→        let targetPerWeek = 3.0
    35→        let actual = Double(workouts.count) / Double(weeks)
    36→        return min(100, Int((actual / targetPerWeek) * 100))
    37→    }
    38→
    39→    private var chartData: [ChartDataPoint] {
    40→        let sorted = workouts.sorted { $0.createdAt < $1.createdAt }
    41→        return sorted.map { workout in
    42→            let totalSets = workout.phases.flatMap(\.items).reduce(0) { $0 + $1.sets }
    43→            return ChartDataPoint(date: workout.createdAt, value: Double(totalSets))
    44→        }
    45→    }
    46→
    47→    var body: some View {
    48→        ScrollView {
    49→            if workouts.isEmpty {
    50→                emptyView
    51→            } else {
    52→                VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: FitTodaySpacing.lg) {
    53→                    metricsRow
    54→                    chartSection
    55→                }
    56→                .padding(.horizontal, FitTodaySpacing.md)
    57→                .padding(.vertical, FitTodaySpacing.sm)
    58→            }
    59→        }
    60→        .scrollIndicators(.hidden)
    61→        .background(FitTodayColor.background)
    62→    }
    63→
    64→    // MARK: - Metrics Row
    65→
    66→    private var metricsRow: some View {
    67→        HStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.sm) {
    68→            EvolutionMetricCard(
    69→                icon: "arrow.up.right",
    70→                value: String(format: "%+.0f%%", loadChange),
    71→                label: "trainer.evolution.load".localized,
    72→                color: FitTodayColor.success
    73→            )
    74→
    75→            EvolutionMetricCard(
    76→                icon: "flame.fill",
    77→                value: "\(totalWorkouts)",
    78→                label: "trainer.evolution.workouts".localized,
    79→                color: FitTodayColor.brandPrimary
    80→            )
    81→
    82→            EvolutionMetricCard(
    83→                icon: "calendar.badge.checkmark",
    84→                value: "\(frequencyPercent)%",
    85→                label: "trainer.evolution.frequency".localized,
    86→                color: FitTodayColor.info
    87→            )
    88→        }
    89→    }
    90→
    91→    // MARK: - Chart Section
    92→
    93→    private var chartSection: some View {
    94→        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: FitTodaySpacing.md) {
    95→            Text("trainer.evolution.chart_title".localized)
    96→                .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 16, weight: .bold))
    97→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textPrimary)
    98→
    99→            if chartData.count >= 2 {
   100→                Chart(chartData) { point in
   101→                    LineMark(
   102→                        x: .value("trainer.evolution.date".localized, point.date),
   103→                        y: .value("trainer.evolution.sets".localized, point.value)
   104→                    )
   105→                    .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.brandPrimary)
   106→                    .interpolationMethod(.catmullRom)
   107→
   108→                    AreaMark(
   109→                        x: .value("trainer.evolution.date".localized, point.date),
   110→                        y: .value("trainer.evolution.sets".localized, point.value)
   111→                    )
   112→                    .foregroundStyle(
   113→                        .linearGradient(
   114→                            colors: [FitTodayColor.brandPrimary.opacity(0.3), .clear],
   115→                            startPoint: .top,
   116→                            endPoint: .bottom
   117→                        )
   118→                    )
   119→                    .interpolationMethod(.catmullRom)
   120→                }
   121→                .chartXAxis {
   122→                    AxisMarks(values: .automatic) { _ in
   123→                        AxisGridLine(stroke: StrokeStyle(lineWidth: 0.5))
   124→                            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.outline)
   125→                        AxisValueLabel()
   126→                            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
   127→                    }
   128→                }
   129→                .chartYAxis {
   130→                    AxisMarks(values: .automatic) { _ in
   131→                        AxisGridLine(stroke: StrokeStyle(lineWidth: 0.5))
   132→                            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.outline)
   133→                        AxisValueLabel()
   134→                            .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
   135→                    }
   136→                }
   137→                .frame(height: 200)
   138→                .padding(FitTodaySpacing.md)
   139→                .background(FitTodayColor.surface)
   140→                .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: FitTodayRadius.md))
   141→            } else {
   142→                Text("trainer.evolution.not_enough_data".localized)
   143→                    .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 14, weight: .medium))
   144→                    .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textSecondary)
   145→                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .center)
   146→                    .padding(.vertical, FitTodaySpacing.xl)
   147→            }
   148→        }
   149→    }
   150→
   151→    // MARK: - Empty View
   152→
   153→    private var emptyView: some View {
   154→        VStack(spacing: FitTodaySpacing.md) {
   155→            Image(systemName: "chart.line.uptrend.xyaxis")
   156→                .font(.system(size: 48))
   157→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textTertiary)
   158→
   159→            Text("trainer.evolution.empty".localized)
   160→                .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 16, weight: .semiBold))
   161→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textPrimary)
   162→
   163→            Text("trainer.evolution.empty_message".localized)
   164→                .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 14, weight: .medium))
   165→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textSecondary)
   166→                .multilineTextAlignment(.center)
   167→        }
   168→        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
   169→        .padding(.top, FitTodaySpacing.xxl)
   170→    }
   171→
   172→    // MARK: - Helpers
   173→
   174→    private func averageExerciseCount(_ workouts: [TrainerWorkout]) -> Double {
   175→        guard !workouts.isEmpty else { return 0 }
   176→        let total = workouts.reduce(0) { sum, workout in
   177→            sum + workout.phases.flatMap(\.items).reduce(0) { $0 + $1.sets }
   178→        }
   179→        return Double(total) / Double(workouts.count)
   180→    }
   181→}
   182→
   183→// MARK: - Chart Data
   184→
   185→private struct ChartDataPoint: Identifiable {
   186→    let id = UUID()
   187→    let date: Date
   188→    let value: Double
   189→}
   190→

1→//
     2→//  CMSWorkoutRepository.swift
     3→//  FitToday
     4→//
     5→//  Protocol for CMS workout data access.
     6→//
     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→
    10→// MARK: - CMS Workout Repository Protocol
    11→
    12→/// Protocol for accessing CMS workout data.
    13→///
    14→/// Provides methods for fetching, updating, and managing trainer workouts
    15→/// from the CMS Personal Trainer system.
    16→protocol CMSWorkoutRepository: Sendable {
    17→
    18→    // MARK: - Fetch Operations
    19→
    20→    /// Fetches workouts for a student from the CMS.
    21→    ///
    22→    /// - Parameters:
    23→    ///   - studentId: The student's user ID.
    24→    ///   - trainerId: Optional trainer ID to filter by.
    25→    ///   - page: Page number for pagination.
    26→    ///   - limit: Number of items per page.
    27→    /// - Returns: A tuple containing the workouts and pagination info.
    28→    func fetchWorkouts(
    29→        studentId: String,
    30→        trainerId: String?,
    31→        page: Int,
    32→        limit: Int
    33→    ) async throws -> (workouts: [TrainerWorkout], hasMore: Bool)
    34→
    35→    /// Fetches a single workout by ID.
    36→    ///
    37→    /// - Parameter id: The workout ID.
    38→    /// - Returns: The TrainerWorkout if found.
    39→    func fetchWorkout(id: String) async throws -> TrainerWorkout
    40→
    41→    /// Fetches a workout as an executable WorkoutPlan.
    42→    ///
    43→    /// - Parameter id: The workout ID.
    44→    /// - Returns: A WorkoutPlan ready for workout execution.
    45→    func fetchWorkoutPlan(id: String) async throws -> WorkoutPlan
    46→
    47→    // MARK: - Progress Operations
    48→
    49→    /// Fetches the student's progress for a workout.
    50→    ///
    51→    /// - Parameter workoutId: The workout ID.
    52→    /// - Returns: The progress data.
    53→    func fetchProgress(workoutId: String) async throws -> CMSWorkoutProgress
    54→
    55→    // MARK: - Feedback Operations
    56→
    57→    /// Fetches all feedback for a workout.
    58→    ///
    59→    /// - Parameter workoutId: The workout ID.
    60→    /// - Returns: An array of feedback items.
    61→    func fetchFeedback(workoutId: String) async throws -> [CMSWorkoutFeedback]
    62→
    63→    /// Posts new feedback for a workout.
    64→    ///
    65→    /// - Parameters:
    66→    ///   - workoutId: The workout ID.
    67→    ///   - type: The feedback type.
    68→    ///   - message: The feedback message.
    69→    ///   - rating: Optional rating (1-5).
    70→    /// - Returns: The created feedback.
    71→    func postFeedback(
    72→        workoutId: String,
    73→        type: CMSFeedbackType,
    74→        message: String,
    75→        rating: Int?
    76→    ) async throws -> CMSWorkoutFeedback
    77→
    78→    // MARK: - Student Registration
    79→
    80→    /// Registers the current user as a student in the CMS for a trainer.
    81→    ///
    82→    /// - Parameters:
    83→    ///   - firebaseUid: The student's Firebase UID.
    84→    ///   - trainerId: The trainer's ID.
    85→    ///   - displayName: The student's display name.
    86→    ///   - email: The student's email (optional).
    87→    func registerStudent(
    88→        firebaseUid: String,
    89→        trainerId: String,
    90→        displayName: String,
    91→        email: String?
    92→    ) async throws
    93→
    94→    // MARK: - Update Operations
    95→
    96→    /// Marks a workout as completed.
    97→    ///
    98→    /// - Parameter id: The workout ID.
    99→    func markWorkoutCompleted(id: String) async throws
   100→
   101→    /// Archives a workout (soft delete from student view).
   102→    ///
   103→    /// - Parameter id: The workout ID.
   104→    func archiveWorkout(id: String) async throws
   105→}
   106→

   298→        .buttonStyle(.plain)
   299→    }
   300→
   301→    private func secondaryButton(title: String, icon: String, action: @escaping () -> Void) -> some View {
   302→        Button(action: action) {
   303→            HStack(spacing: 8) {
   304→                Image(systemName: icon)
   305→                    .font(.system(size: 16, weight: .semibold))
   306→                Text(title)
   307→                    .font(.system(size: 15, weight: .semibold))
   308→            }
   309→            .foregroundStyle(.white)
   310→            .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
   311→            .padding(.vertical, 14)
   312→            .background(.white.opacity(0.15))
   313→            .clipShape(RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 14))
   314→        }
   315→        .buttonStyle(.plain)
   316→    }
   317→
   318→    // MARK: - Gradient
   319→
   320→    private var heroGradient: LinearGradient {
   321→        switch journeyState {
   322→        case .loading:
   323→            return LinearGradient(
   324→                colors: [FitTodayColor.surface, FitTodayColor.surfaceElevated],
   325→                startPoint: .topLeading,
   326→                endPoint: .bottomTrailing
   327→            )
   328→        case .noProfile:
   329→            return FitTodayColor.gradientPrimary
   330→        case .workoutReady:
   331→            return FitTodayColor.gradientPrimary
   332→        case .workoutCompleted:
   333→            return LinearGradient(
   334→                colors: [FitTodayColor.success, FitTodayColor.success.opacity(0.7)],
   335→                startPoint: .topLeading,
   336→                endPoint: .bottomTrailing
   337→            )
   338→        case .error:
   339→            return LinearGradient(
   340→                colors: [FitTodayColor.error.opacity(0.8), FitTodayColor.error.opacity(0.5)],
   341→                startPoint: .topLeading,
   342→                endPoint: .bottomTrailing
   343→            )
   344→        }
   345→    }
   346→}

     8→
     9→import SwiftUI
    10→
    11→struct HomeHeader: View {
    12→    let greeting: String
    13→    let dateFormatted: String
    14→    let isPro: Bool
    15→    let goalBadgeText: String?
    16→    var userName: String?
    17→    var userPhotoURL: URL?
    18→    var onNotificationTap: (() -> Void)?
    19→
    20→    // Computed: first name only for display (nil when no user name)
    21→    private var displayName: String? {
    22→        guard let name = userName, !name.isEmpty else { return nil }
    23→        return name.components(separatedBy: " ").first ?? name
    24→    }
    25→
    26→    // Greeting text with name and emoji
    27→    private var greetingWithName: String {
    28→        if let name = displayName {
    29→            return "\(greeting), \(name)! 👋"
    30→        }
    31→        return "\(greeting)! 👋"
    32→    }
    33→
    34→    var body: some View {
    35→        VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: FitTodaySpacing.xs) {
    36→            Text(greetingWithName)
    37→                .font(.system(size: 24, weight: .bold))
    38→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textPrimary)
    39→
    40→            Text("home.header.subtitle".localized)
    41→                .font(FitTodayFont.ui(size: 15, weight: .medium))
    42→                .foregroundStyle(FitTodayColor.textSecondary)
    43→        }
    44→        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, alignment: .leading)
    45→        .padding(.horizontal)
    46→        .padding(.top, FitTodaySpacing.md)
    47→    }
    48→}

     7→
     8→import Foundation
     9→import FirebaseFirestore
    10→
    11→// MARK: - Firebase Personal Trainer DTO
    12→
    13→/// Firebase DTO for personal trainer data.
    14→///
    15→/// Matches Firestore collection: `/personalTrainers/{id}`
    16→struct FBPersonalTrainer: Codable {
    17→    /// Document ID (populated by Firestore).
    18→    @DocumentID var id: String?
    19→
    20→    /// Display name shown to students.
    21→    var displayName: String
    22→
    23→    /// Trainer's email address.
    24→    var email: String
    25→
    26→    /// URL string to the trainer's profile photo.
    27→    var photoURL: String?
    28→
    29→    /// Areas of expertise (e.g., ["strength", "weight_loss"]).
    30→    var specializations: [String]
    31→
    32→    /// Short biography or description.
    33→    var bio: String?
    34→
    35→    /// Whether the trainer is currently accepting new students.
    36→    var isActive: Bool
    37→
    38→    /// Unique invite code students can use to connect.
    39→    var inviteCode: String?
    40→
    41→    /// Maximum number of students this trainer can manage.
    42→    var maxStudents: Int
    43→
    44→    /// Current number of connected students.
    45→    var currentStudentCount: Int
    46→
    47→    /// When the trainer profile was created.
    48→    @ServerTimestamp var createdAt: Timestamp?
    49→
    50→    /// When the trainer profile was last updated.
    51→    @ServerTimestamp var updatedAt: Timestamp?
    52→
    53→    // MARK: - Initializer
    54→
    55→    init(
    56→        id: String? = nil,
    57→        displayName: String,
    58→        email: String,
    59→        photoURL: String? = nil,
    60→        specializations: [String] = [],
    61→        bio: String? = nil,
    62→        isActive: Bool = true,
    63→        inviteCode: String? = nil,
    64→        maxStudents: Int = 20,
    65→        currentStudentCount: Int = 0,
    66→        createdAt: Timestamp? = nil,
    67→        updatedAt: Timestamp? = nil
    68→    ) {
    69→        self.id = id
    70→        self.displayName = displayName
    71→        self.email = email
    72→        self.photoURL = photoURL
    73→        self.specializations = specializations
    74→        self.bio = bio
    75→        self.isActive = isActive
    76→        self.inviteCode = inviteCode
    77→        self.maxStudents = maxStudents
    78→        self.currentStudentCount = currentStudentCount
    79→        self.createdAt = createdAt
    80→        self.updatedAt = updatedAt
    81→    }
    82→}
    83→
    84→// MARK: - Firebase Trainer Student DTO
    85→
    86→/// Firebase DTO for trainer-student relationship data.
    87→///
    88→/// Matches Firestore collection: `/trainerStudents/{id}`
    89→struct FBTrainerStudent: Codable {
    90→    /// Document ID (populated by Firestore).
    91→    @DocumentID var id: String?
    92→
    93→    /// The personal trainer's identifier.
    94→    var trainerId: String
    95→
    96→    /// The student's identifier (app user).
    97→    var studentId: String
    98→
    99→    /// Current status of the connection (pending, active, paused, cancelled).
   100→    var status: String
   101→
   102→    /// Who initiated the request (student, trainer).
   103→    var requestedBy: String
   104→
   105→    /// When the connection was requested.
   106→    @ServerTimestamp var requestedAt: Timestamp?
   107→
   108→    /// When the connection was accepted.
   109→    var acceptedAt: Timestamp?
   110→
   111→    /// Current subscription status (trial, active, expired).
   112→    var subscriptionStatus: String
   113→
   114→    /// When the subscription expires.
   115→    var subscriptionExpiresAt: Timestamp?
   116→
   117→    /// When this relationship record was created.
   118→    @ServerTimestamp var createdAt: Timestamp?
   119→
   120→    // MARK: - Initializer
   121→
   122→    init(
   123→        id: String? = nil,
   124→        trainerId: String,
   125→        studentId: String,
   126→        status: String = TrainerConnectionStatus.pending.rawValue,
   127→        requestedBy: String,
   128→        requestedAt: Timestamp? = nil,
   129→        acceptedAt: Timestamp? = nil,
   130→        subscriptionStatus: String = TrainerSubscriptionStatus.trial.rawValue,
   131→        subscriptionExpiresAt: Timestamp? = nil,
   132→        createdAt: Timestamp? = nil
   133→    ) {
   134→        self.id = id
   135→        self.trainerId = trainerId
   136→        self.studentId = studentId
   137→        self.status = status
   138→        self.requestedBy = requestedBy
   139→        self.requestedAt = requestedAt
   140→        self.acceptedAt = acceptedAt
   141→        self.subscriptionStatus = subscriptionStatus
   142→        self.subscriptionExpiresAt = subscriptionExpiresAt
   143→        self.createdAt = createdAt
   144→    }
   145→}

     8→import Foundation

    11→
    12→/// Responsável por montar e expor o container de dependências da aplicação.
    13→struct AppContainer {
    14→    let container: Container
    15→    let router: AppRouter
    16→    let modelContainer: ModelContainer
    17→
    18→    @MainActor
    19→    static func build() -> AppContainer {
    20→        let modelContainer = makeModelContainer()
    21→        return build(modelContainer: modelContainer)
    22→    }
    23→
    24→    @MainActor
    25→    static func build(modelContainer: ModelContainer) -> AppContainer {
    26→        let container = Container()
    27→        container.register(ModelContainer.self) { _ in modelContainer }
    28→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    29→
    30→        let router = AppRouter()
    31→        container.register(AppRouting.self) { _ in router }
    32→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    33→
    34→        // Image Cache Service
    35→        let imageCacheConfig = ImageCacheConfiguration.default
    36→        let imageCacheService = ImageCacheService(configuration: imageCacheConfig)
    37→        container.register(ImageCaching.self) { _ in imageCacheService }
    38→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    39→        
    40→        // Repositórios
    41→        container.register(UserProfileRepository.self) { _ in
    42→            SwiftDataUserProfileRepository(modelContainer: modelContainer)
    43→        }.inObjectScope(.container)
    44→
    45→        container.register(WorkoutHistoryRepository.self) { _ in
    46→            SwiftDataWorkoutHistoryRepository(modelContainer: modelContainer)
    47→        }.inObjectScope(.container)
    48→
    49→        container.register(UserStatsRepository.self) { _ in
    50→            SwiftDataUserStatsRepository(modelContainer: modelContainer)
    51→        }.inObjectScope(.container)
    52→        
    53→        // Workout Composition Cache (F7)
    54→        container.register(WorkoutCompositionCacheRepository.self) { _ in
    55→            SwiftDataWorkoutCompositionCacheRepository(modelContainer: modelContainer)
    56→        }.inObjectScope(.container)
    57→
    58→        // WorkoutBlocksRepository é registrado após configurar Wger (para permitir enriquecimento de mídia/instruções).
    59→
    60→        // StoreKit Service e EntitlementRepository
    61→        // Nota: StoreKitService é @MainActor, então precisa ser criado no main thread
    62→        let storeKitService = StoreKitService()
    63→        container.register(StoreKitService.self) { _ in storeKitService }
    64→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    65→        
    66→        let entitlementRepository = StoreKitEntitlementRepository(modelContainer: modelContainer, storeKitService: storeKitService)
    67→        container.register(EntitlementRepository.self) { _ in entitlementRepository }
    68→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    69→        
    70→        // Feature Gating Use Case
    71→        let aiUsageTracker = SimpleAIUsageTracker()
    72→        container.register(AIUsageTracking.self) { _ in aiUsageTracker }
    73→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    74→        
    75→        container.register(FeatureGating.self) { resolver in
    76→            FeatureGatingUseCase(
    77→                entitlementRepository: resolver.resolve(EntitlementRepository.self)!,
    78→                usageTracker: resolver.resolve(AIUsageTracking.self)
    79→            )
    80→        }.inObjectScope(.container)
    81→
    82→        // ========== REMOTE CONFIG & FEATURE FLAGS ==========
    83→
    84→        // Remote Config Service - wraps Firebase Remote Config
    85→        let remoteConfigService = RemoteConfigService()
    86→        container.register(RemoteConfigServicing.self) { _ in remoteConfigService }
    87→            .inObjectScope(.container)
    88→
    89→        // Feature Flag Repository - provides feature flag access with caching
    90→        container.register(FeatureFlagRepository.self) { resolver in
    91→            RemoteConfigFeatureFlagRepository(
    92→                remoteConfigService: resolver.resolve(RemoteConfigServicing.self)!
    93→            )
    94→        }
    95→        .inObjectScope(.container)
    96→
    97→        // Feature Flag Use Case - combines feature flags with entitlement
    98→        container.register(FeatureFlagChecking.self) { resolver in
    99→            FeatureFlagUseCase(
   100→                featureFlagRepository: resolver.resolve(FeatureFlagRepository.self)!,
   101→                featureGating: resolver.resolve(FeatureGating.self)!
   102→            )
   103→        }
   104→        .inObjectScope(.container)
   105→
   106→        // ========== END REMOTE CONFIG & FEATURE FLAGS ==========
   107→
   108→        // Wger Exercise Service (Free API - no API key needed)
   109→        let wgerService = WgerAPIService()
   110→        container.register(ExerciseServiceProtocol.self) { _ in wgerService }
   111→            .inObjectScope(.container)
   112→        container.register(WgerAPIService.self) { _ in wgerService }
   113→            .inObjectScope(.container)
   114→

   116→        let blocksRepository = BundleWorkoutBlocksRepository()
   117→        container.register(WorkoutBlocksRepository.self) { _ in blocksRepository }
   118→            .inObjectScope(.container)
   119→

   121→        let enrichedLibraryRepository = WgerEnrichedLibraryWorkoutsRepository(

   125→        container.register(LibraryWorkoutsRepository.self) { _ in enrichedLibraryRepository }

   163→        // WorkoutPlanComposing: Use OpenAI if available, otherwise enhanced local

   167→            // Try to create OpenAI composer if API key is configured
